Simplified version


Change Log:

vlink is a portable linker, that can read and write a wide range
of object- and executable file formats. It can be used to link a
specific target format from several different input file formats,
or for converting, stripping and manipulating files.

vlink is mainly used for non-mainstream architectures.

WWW: http://sun.hasenbraten.de/vlink/


portlint: OK (-AC, looks fine.)
testport: OK (poudriere, 11.0, 10.3, amd64/i386)
